game.short_text: Park in the SPACE
game.title: Space Landers

details.title: Space Landers
details.description:
Welcome to the PARKINGSPACE!
In this short interactive space-based parking simulator for the Gameboy and Personal Computer, you have a test to pass! Fly across the rough and rocky terrain of various asteroids and moons in your fragile little rinky-dink ship, and earn your space driver's license!
Controls:
In this game, spacing is key. Fly through cramped low-gravity spaces, where even the slightest bump can spell your doom! You will need these controls if you are to survive:
Keyboard:
Arrow Keys: Move (only when flying)Z: Fly (by the way, when the cutscenes say to press A just press Z instead)X: ShootEnter: Start
Gameboy:
D-Pad: Move (only when flying)
A: FlyB: ShootStart: Start
Uh, who makes this?
The Sam: Game Design, Level Design, Scripting, ArtMysticFox: Art and Level DesignIPEKEK: MusicSpecial thanks to Coffee "Valen" Bat for the wonderful sound effects package we used in the making of this game! Check it out here!
This game was made for GBJam 11. Behold!

game.short_text: Retro-style space trucker game about hauling cargo and paying off your debt.
game.title: Deep Space Trucker 9

details.title: Deep Space Trucker 9
details.description:
My submission to GBJam 11, Deep Space Trucker 9 is a slice-of-life game about hauling cargo around to pay off your ship's debt. This will involve carefully choosing your cargo and taking advantage of different prices at each location. 
The theme for the Jam was Space which this game showcases in a couple of unique ways. First, the most obvious is that the game takes place in space. However, a key component of the game is managing the space of your cargo hold by selecting different types of cargo and balancing the weight between the left and right holds. Finally, the player's ship also includes an option to re-arrange furniture to affect the space within your ship. 
As a part of GBJam, the game is designed to look like a Gameboy game. However, the game was also made using GB Studio so you can also play the game on a similar platform by downloading the ROM and running the .gb file.This page is the original Jam version/post-jam version. The full in development game can be found here as Cos-Mack Trucker. 
Controls:
WASD/Arrow Keys - Move
Z/J - Interact
X/K - Cancel
Enter - Start

moreInfo.Author: Raptorspank

Hopscape is an adventure game that challenges you to navigate a dungeon filled.. with missing spaces...
Your mission: Clear rooms of varying types to reach the end of each level. But here's the twist - you get to choose which rooms fill those empty spaces! 
Will you opt for the path of least resistance, selecting rooms with fewer encounters? Or will you embrace the challenge and take on enemies for greater rewards? 

The choice is yours!

game.short_text: Shoot the stars
game.title: Starsign Treasure Hunter

details.title: Starsign Treasure Hunter
details.description:
Star Sign Treasure Hunter is an Item management RPG in which every day, the player can take some time to explore and find items useful items that must also be carefully selected to be sold to pay off their friend's rent.

please note that due to this game being made in a week, certain aspects are missing polish and or may be dysfunctional at times.

Gameplay:

Play through one week where every day you have time to explore a portion of a dungeon. Fight enemies and find treasure to amass wealth and help pay your friend's rent
Battles:
Battles are turn based. With the player always going first if they manage to land a first strike on their opponent by attacking them in the overworld.
Each participant in a battle makes use of "skills" to attack enemies and support their allies. These skills cost SP to use, which can only be restored by items or by returning to the overworld.
If a participant (both the player's party and the opposing party) strikes an enemy with a skill of a type that the target is weak to, they will gain "tempo", which allows them to take another action for free. Alternatively, the player can choose to pass the turn to an ally to give them a small attack boost in addition to the extra turn (maximum of once per ally per round)
Item fusion:
Certain items in the game can be fused onto your allies to change their capabilities. A fusion item may change the ally's stats, type affinities, or available skills. These items are lost upon fusion.
Item management:
Each item the player will find has a monetary value as well as value inside of combat Every day, a select few items will be "hot" items. These items will sell for 3x their original price

Controls:


Gameplay controls

Gameboy
Keyboard
A
X/J
B
C/K
Dpad
Cursor keys/WASD
Start
Enter
Select
Shift

System controls

Function

1-7

Many controllers are supported

game.short_text: A Game Boy inspired platformer made for GBJAM11.
game.title: Over the Moon

details.title: Over the Moon
details.description:
About the Game
Over the Moon is Pocket Pulp's submission for GBJAM11.
You must search all over the moon to find the missing parts to your cryogenic chamber in this cute platformer. 
Game Controls:
KeyboardActionControllerArrowsMoveD-PadZPick Up / Put DownAXJumpBEnterReset / Teleport to CheckpointStart

If you have a USB controller it should work with the game. Go to our site where you can adjust music, sound and gamepad settings.



We incorporated the 'space' theme by first having a character who only had the space in their inventory to carry one item at a time. You will also find in the game play areas where there is not enough space for the character to fit while carrying an item.
We doubled down on the space theme by setting the game on a moon base. Players will find that gravity changes in our game. Both the location of the player, inside vs outside, and the objects carried by the player can change the gravity experienced.

How It Was Made
The game was made by 2 people without a game engine. The below tools were used to make the game:
JavaScript (code)Asesprite (art)Pixaki (art)Tiled (level design)FamiStudio (music comp)jsfxr (sound fx)
We recorded us making the game for our YouTube channel. Watch the video on what we didon day 1 of the jam.
This is our first official game jam and are very much looking forward to hearing your thoughts on our submission.

Tiny Space Ninja
The International Space Station is being stalked by tiny peeping aliens again! Annoyed by this mild inconvenience, the station's astronauts have hired a tiny ninja caretaker to destroy these extraterrestrial pests and gain their privacy back.

Z
A

X
B
Choose Sword Direction
Arrow keys
D-pad

Credits
Cedric - Design, ArtGabby - Music, Design, ProgrammingJuni - Design, Programming
 
Troubleshooting
I can't play the web version on macOS
If the web version doesn't work, you can download the native version down below.This happens because Godot 4's web export currently can't run on macOS and iOS due to upstream bugs.
It says my browser is missing features
You need to update your browser or use another one.Godot requires support for WebAssembly, WebGL and SharedArrayBuffer. If your browser version is older than 2020, you might need to update it. Opening your browser's console should reveal more information.
My Mac gives me a security errorTo open the game on macOS, right-click the app and click Open, then click Open again in the popup.This is because of a feature called Gatekeeper, which verifies apps are legitimate. Since we do not have a developer account, the app is not notarized.

game.short_text: a weapon-upgrading, surviving game
game.title: scherzomachina

details.title: scherzomachina
details.description:
Wires snake through the cockpit.
Your eye is closed.
Each connection completes the same way it has a thousand times before. The servos on your mech whir to life.
There's another wretched planet in ruins, but with no locals left to save, your orders are clear: KILL EVERYTHING.
Slot mods into your weapon's upgrade matrix, unlock nodes on the grid to make permanent improvements to your mech, and then hop back into the action over and over again.
With 14 weapons, 81 mech upgrades, and even more unique mod combinations in your arsenal, you are Machine Lass! And you must eradicate the killer robots that ruined this world.
Revel in the mechanical excess of SCHERZOMACHINA, an action roguelike from the creative minds behind Fallstar, Witch Machine, and Bloom Cavatina.
INPUTS:
Z - Confirm (A)X - Cancel (B)C - Start / Open optionsV - Select / Open upgrades menuArrow keys - Directional movement download, unzip, play. made with godot 4.1. mac and linux versions are completely untested. so, you know, buyer beware.

game.short_text: Carefully space your bouncing projectile in this exciting action platformer!
game.title: Castle of the Cosmos

details.title: Castle of the Cosmos
details.description:
CLICK HERE FOR WEB BUILD!
The lost princess of a ruined kingdom returns to her former home to cast out the celestial monster that has ravaged her once shining castle. Use her unique magic abilities to storm the castle and reclaim the throne in this thrilling action platformer!
Created for GBJam 11, Castle of the Cosmos features a unique damage mechanic involving a projectile that reflects off of walls and grows in strength with each reflection. This mechanic encourages players to think carefully about the spacing of their attacks, rather than just fire directly at oncoming enemies; the more walls the projectile bounces off of, the more damage you'll inflict. Experiment with both grounded and jumping throws to maximize your damage output and defeat all that stand in your way!
Controls

WASD/Arrow Keys = MoveZ/Space = JumpX/Left Mouse = Throw ProjectileThe game features basic controller support as well, so feel free to try it with your preferred gamepad!


Credits
Scenario and Design: Adam, Beaumont, Joey, Kitsu, Knight, Lexou, Picto, Prism, Shaunak, Soral
Art and Animation: Adam, Beaumont, Knight, Lexou, Picto, Prism
Programming: Shaunak
Music/SFX: Joey, Lexou
2023 Galloway Games

game.short_text: A Claustrophobic Horror Experience
game.title: W A L L S

details.title: W A L L S
details.description:
W A L L S
never look away




W A L L S is a claustrophobic horror game where the player's survival depends on maintaining their own space between the game's four walls that are closing in every second. Equipped with a flashlight (and a pistol if you can find it!) Your only defense is using light to push the walls back, but be careful of what else you uncover...
Created in participation of GBJam11 under the theme "SPACE", the game is rendered in 160 x 144, follows the original Gameboys control inputs, and is made up entirely out of only 4 colors.

CONTROLS:
WASD + JK
or
Arrow Keys + XC
or
D-Pad + BA

Programming, Music/SFX, and Art by me

the music on the HTML5 version is a bit broken.  songs do not cut off when they should resulting in several overlapping tracks at the same time.  this is unfortunately an issue with the game engine's exporter and i have no idea how to fix it.  if you do only play this version, please give the soundtrack a listen on youtube (link below) so you can hear how wonderful it actually is!also it has come to our attention that some antivirus software may think the game contains a virus.  this seems to be an issue with all games made with GameMaker.  i can assure you it is safe to run and there are no viruses in the game files.the game isn't 100% finished, but the core gameplay is mostly there and there's some sense of a story to it... i think.  thanks for taking time to check it out!

game.short_text: A puzzling adventure for the Game Boy
game.title: The Big Breakout

details.title: The Big Breakout
details.description:
🔒 The Big Breakout!
A very slightly puzzling game of escape for the Game Boy - your team on the outside can get you the items you need, but they have to fit in peculiar shapes to get to you so you can break out.
Pick items to take on your adventure, then run the scenario to see what happens. Good luck!

You can play The Big Breakout in the browser or in an emulator or on your actual Game Boy by downloading the ROM file provided. 🎮
Controls
Z - A button
X - B button
WASD or arrow keys - directional pad
Enter/Return - start button (runs the escape scenario)
Left shift - select button (opens the menu in from within levels)

About
A game by kattrali and kylef, made with GBDK-2020 for GBJam11!

moreInfo.Tags: Game Boy, Game Boy ROM, Singleplayer

game.short_text: Entry for GBJam 11
game.title: Starfleet strategist

details.title: Starfleet strategist
details.description:
Starfleet strategist  
Your starship fleet is strong, but the waves of alien attacks are relentless. Can your engineers improve your ships to stay ahead of the aliens’ growing fleet? Can your commanders set strategic formations for the battlefield? Choose wisely, or all is lost.
Controls
Menu navigation: Arrow keys, enter, esc
  
Remove component from ship: Delete
      
Credits

Programming: Simo Korhonen
Art & SFX: Emily Johnson
Music: Thijs Luttikhuis
Note
Sadly few critical UI bugs made it to the last submitted version. Fixed version available here: https://adyss.itch.io/starfleet-strategist

moreInfo.Tags: Space

details.title: Cosmic Pulse - GBJam11
details.description:
Cosmic Pulse

Inspired by the timeless aesthetics and challenges of Game Boy classics, "Cosmic Pulse" is our proud submission for the GBJam11, made in 10 days! 

In the vast, uncharted reaches of space, a lone spaceship drifts, its crew besieged by alien invaders. Enter PULSE, an advanced robot with a mission: navigate the ship's treacherous corridors, outwit extraterrestrial threats, and make heartbreaking choices to safeguard Earth. Dive deep into a tale of duty, sacrifice, and unexpected alliances. In "Cosmic Pulse," every decision ripples through the cosmos. Will you rise to the challenge?

Controls
GameBoyKeyboard 1Keyboard2AZWBXUPUp arrowDOWNDown arrowLEFTLeft arrowRIGHTRight arrowSTARTEnterSELECTC

Soundtrack
You can access the game soundtrack here

Credits

Toadzilla - Art, ProgrammingBeej - Music, SFX

game.short_text: Tetris-style game where your goal is to break the most tiles in a 5x5 grid area without running out of possible moves
game.title: Packed In!

details.title: Packed In!
details.description:
If the game is too small, zoom in on your browser
Made for the GBJam 2023
Controls
Gameboy (Purely Aesthetical)KeyboardD-PadWASDBSpaceAKSelectLeft ShiftStartEnter
Gameplay
Place pieces to destroy rows and columns of tiles. The more tiles you destroy at once, the higher the points you will get. Make sure to plan ahead though, or you will find yourself out of space to place new pieces!
Can you beat my High Score of 88030?
Music by sat9
